title: Complementary and supplementary angles (visual)
description: Use your knowledge about complementary and supplementary angles to find missing angles.

assessment_items.question_content:
**What is the measure of $\angle x$?**  
*Angles are not necessarily drawn to scale.*

[[☃ image 1]]



$x = $ [[☃ numeric-input 1]] $\Large{\degree}$
hints: From the diagram, we see that $\angle AOB$ and $\angle BOC$ are complementary angles.

options.alt: A right angle A O C oriented diagonally is shown. Line O B divides the right angle into angles A O B and B O C. Angle A O B is labeled as 73 degrees and angle B O C is labeled as x degrees.
